scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    CAST(control_id AS VARCHAR(50))                 AS control_id,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    establecimiento_id,
    fecha_control,
    1                                                AS sistema_key,
    nro_control,
    semana_gestacion,
    peso_madre_kg,
    presion_arterial,
    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(100))                      AS resultado
FROM silver.sup_controles_prenatales

UNION ALL

SELECT
    CAST(control_id AS VARCHAR(50))                 AS control_id,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(20))                       AS establecimiento_id,
    fecha_control,
    2                                                AS sistema_key,
    nro_control,
    semana_gestacion,
    peso_madre_kg,
    presion_arterial,
    resultado
FROM silver.bja_controles_prenatales',
